attacking_style: Not a primary attacker; functions as leadout man in sprint trains. When forced to sprint independently due to team disorganization, lacks the finishing speed of designated sprinters.
team_tactics: Designated leadout rider for Quick-Step sprint train, specifically tasked with delivering MODOLO to final positioning. Team execution shows vulnerability to miscommunication in final positioning.
terrain_preference: Flat sprint stages where leadout work is required. Not suited for solo efforts or complex finishes requiring independent decision-making under pressure.
vulnerability: Exposed when sprint train breaks down or miscommunication occurs regarding protected sprinter position. Lacks adaptability when forced into unplanned sprint role without designated finisher on wheel.
key_patterns: Functions as dedicated leadout rider in Quick-Step sprint train, specifically for MODOLO (2 instances)
Sprint train suffered positioning breakdowns with wrong riders on wheel in critical moments (2 instances)
Forced into improvised sprinting when designated finisher not in position, suggesting limited finishing capability (2 instances)
form_trajectory: neutral: Limited data shows consistent role execution issues rather than individual form decline. Problems stem from team coordination rather than personal performance degradation.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 16
